text:
She, who was his wife in
Jupt. the previous birth, becomes his wife in
Mer. this fife too.
Unfortunately, Venus is con
junct Mars and the second house to
Venus is occupied by Jupiter and
Db.
Mercury. The native is, therefore, sure
/
to be married twice in life. When
Venus in his rounds contacts Rahu at the age of about 39th or 40th year, his
first wife will pass away (Jupiter completes three rounds and contacts Rahu
after four years (12 x 3 = 36 and 36 + 4 = 40) .. This causes death offrrst wife.
When next Jupiter enters Sagittarius his own house and gets the aspect of
Venus in Gemini (7th to Sagittarius) he will marry again.
He will deal in various things and also earn money in several ways. If
he outlives 43, he will shuffle off his moral coil at 52.
CHART423
Here, Jupiter is placed in Gemini with Ketu. There are no planets till
Scorpio. Rahu is in the seventh to Jupiter.
If he outlives 7th, ,13th and 14th years, he will live upto 67.

IMPORTANT CHARTS 279
